case_for: Cousins has shown flashes of upside this season (28.6 and 17.8 point games), so positive touchdown variance could push him past 12 points even in a down stretch.
case_against: His last four games show a clear downward trend (10.2, 4.9, 2.1, 9.8), and the pregame projection of 9.8 sits well below the 12-point threshold, suggesting declining performance or an injury/offensive issue.
